editFitnessDetails.title: Edit Fitness Details
editFitnessDetails.selectGoalSubtitle: Choose the goal that best fits your training
editFitnessDetails.selectActivitySubtitle: Pick based on your whole day, not just workouts

activityLevelDescriptions.sedentary: Desk or sit-down job, under 5,000 steps/day, no regular exercise
activityLevelDescriptions.light: Desk job or mostly sitting. Gym or light exercise 2–4×/week but low movement otherwise. Most office workers who exercise fall here
activityLevelDescriptions.moderate: On your feet a good part of the day (teacher, retail, nurse) AND exercise 3–5×/week, or 7,500–10,000+ steps/day
activityLevelDescriptions.active: Physically demanding job (trades, healthcare) or daily intense training with high movement all day
activityLevelDescriptions.superActive: Hard physical job (construction, farming, military) plus regular training — moving heavily most of the day

fitnessGoalDescriptions.hypertrophy: Focus on muscle size and definition
fitnessGoalDescriptions.strength: Focus on maximum strength and power
fitnessGoalDescriptions.weightLoss: Focus on fat loss and toning

experienceDescriptions.beginner: New to consistent training. Still learning movements and gaining strength quickly week to week
experienceDescriptions.intermediate: Comfortable with main lifts. Training consistently for 1–3 years, progress comes monthly rather than weekly
experienceDescriptions.advanced: 3+ years of structured, consistent training. Progress is slow and hard-earned — near your strength potential
